title: The Cavalry of Rome
designIntent: Terrain world-map movement that enters original formation-command encounters using light, medium, and heavy troop classes.
protectedExpressionGuardrails: Do not copy tabletop scenario layouts, card systems, dice faces, command sections, rule text, or unit-stat tables.
Keep encounter tactics based on morale, cohesion, fatigue, terrain pressure, posture, command timing, and cavalry momentum.
Use Roman-history flavor as original content, not as a digital recreation of a board game ruleset.
currentLocalSurfaces: campaign map content and click-to-move march state
nextLedge: Extract the formation resolver into a DOM-free module smoke and prove identical command sequences produce identical outcomes.
